tex: Write down the mathematical name of this type of angle.

$^\circ$C

$^\circ$C

87, 77, 57, 47, 27

From this list, write down

(a) a cube number,

(b) a prime number.

On the probability scale, draw an arrow ($\rightarrow$) to show the probability that a ball taken at random is

(a) blue,

(b) red or blue.

This price is reduced by 18\% in a sale.
Work out the sale price.

\$

Find the value of m.

Find the value of n.

Show that the value of x is 41.8, correct to 3 significant figures.

You may use the tally column to help you.

Colour of car & Tally & Frequency \\
\hline
Black & & \\
\hline
Grey & & \\
\hline
Red & & \\
\hline

(b) Write down the mode.

 cm$^2$

(b) $\dfrac{-3}{5} - \dfrac{2}{6}$

(c) $2 \times \dfrac{-3}{-5}$

The diagram shows a conversion graph for dollars and Kenyan shillings.

(a) Use the graph to change 5000 shillings to dollars.

\$ 

(b) Explain how to use this graph to change \$420 to shillings.

(c) The exchange rate is now \$1 = 90 shillings.
On the grid, draw another line to show this exchange rate.

Ten athletes compete in both the 100 metre race and the triple jump.
Their results are shown in the scatter diagram.

(a) One of these athletes jumps 15.12 m in the triple jump.
Write down his time for the 100 metre race.

 s

(b) The values for two other athletes are shown in the table.

\begin{tabular}{cc}
Distance in the triple jump (m) & 14.74 \\
Time for 100 m (seconds) & 13.2 \\
\end{tabular}

\begin{tabular}{cc}
Distance in the triple jump (m) & 15.2 \\
Time for 100 m (seconds) & 12.76 \\
\end{tabular}

On the scatter diagram, plot these points.

(c) On the scatter diagram, draw a line of best fit.

(d) What type of correlation is shown in the scatter diagram?
texHtml:
Ten athletes compete in both the 100 metre race and the triple jump. Their results are shown in the scatter diagram. (a) One of these athletes jumps 15.12 m in the triple jump. Write down his time for the 100 metre race. s (b) The values for two other athletes are shown in the table.
Distance in the triple jump (m)14.74
Time for 100 m (seconds)13.2
Distance in the triple jump (m)15.2
Time for 100 m (seconds)12.76
On the scatter diagram, plot these points. (c) On the scatter diagram, draw a line of best fit. (d) What type of correlation is shown in the scatter diagram?

tex:
The scale drawing shows a triangle ABC.
The scale is 1 centimetre represents 8 kilometres.

(a) Using a straight edge and compasses only, construct the bisector of angle BAC.
Show all your construction arcs.

(b) Draw the locus of points inside triangle ABC that are 56 km from C.

(c) Shade the region inside triangle ABC that is
• more than 56 km from C
and
• nearer to AC than to AB.
